mission.title: etcd: Can not go get benchmark CLI tool
mission.description: Can not go get benchmark CLI tool. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current etcd deployment
steps.description:
Verify your etcd version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd
helm list -n etcd 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working etcd installation.

steps.title: Review etcd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant etcd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd
kubectl get configmap -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=etcd
```
go version go1.15.1 linux/amd64
Using  `go get go.etcd.io/etcd/tools/benchmark` results in:

`go get go.etcd.io/etcd/tools/benchmark: module go.etcd.io/etcd found (v3.3.25+incompatible), but does not contain package go.etcd.io/etcd/tools/benchmark`

steps.title: Apply the fix for Can not go get benchmark CLI tool
steps.description:
I noticed a lot of users mentioning `go get go.etcd.io/etcd/tools/benchmark` does not work for the `benchmark` tool. This updates the instructions to avoid confusion. I am not sure if the goal is to get it to work with `go get`, but I would suggest we open a follow-up issue if we want to.
```yaml
go build ; 
go install
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd
kubectl get events -n etcd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Can not go get benchmark CLI tool" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: I noticed a lot of users mentioning `go get go.etcd.io/etcd/tools/benchmark` does not work for the `benchmark` tool. This updates the instructions to avoid confusion. I am not sure if the goal is to get it to work with `go get`, but I would suggest we open a follow-up issue if we want to.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with etcd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
